seo.title: Projekt X — BEATROX Custom Stage Fabrication
seo.description: A custom-fabricated modular X-shaped stage element for Adriatique's worldwide 'X Future' tour — engineered to California safety standards, pixel-mappable, and built from aircraft-grade aluminum.

og.title: Projekt X — Custom Stage Fabrication for Adriatique
og.description: A modular LED-lit X stage element engineered for Adriatique's worldwide tour — aluminum construction, pixel-mappable, built to California safety standards.

hero.headline: Projekt X
hero.subheadline: A precision-engineered custom stage element built for global touring — pixel-mapped, laser-mappable, and designed for any orientation.

metadata.type: Custom Fabricated Stage Element, Specialized Production

body.heading: Design Objective
body.content: The goal of this project was to create a custom fabricated set piece for Adriatique's upcoming worldwide tour, 'X Future,' that would serve as the central element in the stage design. The set piece was designed to be easily crated, toured, rigged, pixel mapped, laser mapped, and flown in any orientation.

body.heading: Design Concept
body.content:
The custom-fabricated set piece was engineered to meet the highest safety standards in California, United States, and shipped with all appropriate drawings, load specifications, and engineering stamps. The set piece incorporates custom edge-lit DMX addressable LEDs that outline and are recessed inside the structural arms of the X.

The highly detailed build drawings were conceived in Rhino3D and finalized in SolidWorks. The X is composed of 4 identical armatures and an interchangeable exterior skinning system, allowing for maximum modularity and flexibility across venues worldwide. Built from aluminum to maximize the strength-to-weight ratio, with extensive rigging points available on each face to allow for unlimited rigging options.

body.heading: Key Features
items: Modular X-shaped architecture: 4 identical armatures for maximum flexibility
Interchangeable exterior skinning system for venue adaptation
Custom edge-lit DMX addressable LEDs for pixel and laser mapping
California safety standard engineering with full documentation and stamps
Aluminum construction for optimal strength-to-weight ratio
Multi-face rigging points for unlimited flown orientations
Designed for easy crating and international freight
Fully compatible with projection mapping and interactive software
